display.purpose: Page titles only. Modest scale; the instrument is labeled, not shouting.

label.purpose: 11px uppercase tracked caps over table headers and stat tiles. The only sanctioned uppercase.

data.purpose: Every number, id, duration, and model name. Tabular figures, fixed grid.

code.purpose: Expanded tool input and result bodies.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, native dialog/popover, menus that escape the layout. The only ambient shadow.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus and active inputs. Focus is a lilac glow, not a browser outline.

motion.name: dur-fast
motion.purpose: Row hover tint, button background shift, small state changes.

motion.name: dur-base
motion.purpose: Tool-body expand (height and fade), panel transitions.

motion.name: dur-slow
motion.purpose: SSE message entrance (slide and fade), needle-settle glow.

motion.name: ease-settle
motion.purpose: Ease-out-quart for entrances and the live value settle. No bounce.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover and focus state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single filled-lilac action in a view. Reserve for the one primary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c6a8f2; color: #1a1320; font: 500 0.875rem/1 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b693ea; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(198,168,242,0.5); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action on a steel fill with a scribed hairline.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #232230; color: #e6e3f0; font: 500 0.875rem/1 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid #383548; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #2b2939; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(198,168,242,0.5); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Steel fill, scribed border, lilac focus ring and border shift.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #1b1a24; color: #e6e3f0; font: 400 0.875rem/1.4 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid #383548; border-radius: 4px; padding: 7px 10px; min-width: 280px; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9a94ad; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #c6a8f2; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(198,168,242,0.5); }

components.name: Agent Tag
components.description: A machined rectangular tag (never a pill). Agent name in lilac, label caps.
components.css: .ds-tag-agent { display: inline-block; background: #232230; color: #c6a8f2; font: 500 0.6875rem/1.2 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border: 1px solid #383548; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 7px; }

components.name: Stat Tile
components.description: An instrument readout: knurled cap label over a large mono value. Live updates underglow lilac and settle.
components.css: .ds-stat { background: #1b1a24; border: 1px solid #383548; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; min-width: 120px; } .ds-stat-label { color: #9a94ad; font: 500 0.6875rem/1.2 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-stat-value { margin-top: 4px; color: #e6e3f0; font: 450 1.125rem/1.2 Geist Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; transition: text-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-stat-value.ds-settling { text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(198,168,242,0.7); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-stat-value { transition: none; } .ds-stat-value.ds-settling { text-shadow: none; } }

components.name: Tool Chip
components.description: Signature component. A tool call as a compact metadata chip; the body stamp is a button that expands inline.
components.html: Readinternal/server/web/web.gook
components.css: .ds-tool-chip { display: inline-flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; background: #1b1a24; border: 1px solid #383548; border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 10px; font: 450 0.8125rem/1.4 Geist Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-tool-name { color: #c6a8f2; font-weight: 500; } .ds-tool-path { color: #9a94ad; } .ds-tool-stamp { background: #232230; color: #c5c1d6; font: inherit; border: 1px solid #383548; border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 7px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-tool-stamp:hover { background: #c6a8f2; color: #1a1320; border-color: #c6a8f2; } .ds-tool-stamp:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(198,168,242,0.5); } .ds-tool-ok { color: #9fd6a6; }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: The primary data grid. Hairline separators, mono tabular numerics right-aligned, full-row hover.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-table td { padding: 8px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #383548; color: #e6e3f0; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-table a { color: #c6a8f2; text-decoration: none; } .ds-table a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-table .ds-num { text-align: right; font-family: Geist Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-table tr:hover td { background: #232230; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Sticky top bar on steel with a scribed underline. Active links in lilac, the rest subtext.
components.html:
akari
ProjectsSearchAccount
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; padding: 12px 24px; background: #1b1a24; border-bottom: 1px solid #383548; font: 400 0.875rem/1 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-brand { font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; color: #e6e3f0; } .ds-nav nav { display: flex; gap: 16px; } .ds-nav a { color: #c5c1d6; text-decoration: none; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav a:hover, .ds-nav a.ds-active { color: #c6a8f2; }

narrative.overview: akari is an instrument, not a dashboard. The model is a machinist's bench under low shop light: steel surfaces with a faint violet cast, scribed hairlines instead of heavy frames, knurled-cap labels over precise readouts, and every number machined to tolerance in a monospace face. The palette is the surprise: muted lilac and pastel signal colors on a deep violet-graphite base, a Catppuccin-Mocha sensibility rather than the literal scheme. Desaturation is the discipline, so the surface reads as serious tooling rather than a toy. Color is a signal, never decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Deep violet-graphite base; muted lilac signature carried on under 10% of a screen.
Scribed 1px hairlines and tonal layering do the structural work; shadows are rare.
Every figure is monospaced and tabular, so values never shift as data streams.
Tight radii (4 to 10px) and machined rectangular tags, never consumer pills.
Motion settles like an instrument needle: fast, purposeful, reversible.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Machined Lilac covers at most 10% of any screen, reserved for the primary action, links, focus, and the live signal. If two things on screen are lilac, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Blue Demotion Rule
rules.body: Blue is forbidden as an interface accent (the generic-SaaS tell). It survives only as Sky, one series in the chart ramp.

rules.name: The Muted Pastel Rule
rules.body: Every signal color is desaturated against a genuinely dark ground. If a hue looks candy-bright, lower its chroma until it reads as an instrument light.

rules.name: The Tabular Tolerance Rule
rules.body: Every number renders in Geist Mono with tabular-nums. A value that jitters by a pixel as it updates is a defect, like a gauge with a loose needle.

rules.name: The Caps-Once Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracking is permitted only on the 11px label role. Never set body text, buttons, or headings in tracked uppercase.

rules.name: The Scribed Line Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are bordered by a single 1px hairline, not a heavy frame. A component that needs a 2px-plus colored edge to separate is layered wrong; restate it with tone.

rules.name: The Float-Earns-Shadow Rule
rules.body: A shadow is allowed only on something that actually overlaps other content (a menu, a dialog). Resting cards, tiles, and rows are flat.

dos: Do carry Machined Lilac (#c6a8f2) on at most 10% of a screen, reserved for the primary action, links, focus, and the live signal.
Do set every number in Geist Mono with tabular-nums, so values hold their position as data streams in.
Do build depth from the tonal surface ladder and 1px scribed hairlines; keep resting surfaces flat.
Do keep radii tight (4 to 10px) and render badges as machined rectangles.
Do desaturate every pastel against the dark ground, and back every status hue with a label or icon, never color alone.
Do give live updates a 120 to 220ms settle and a prefers-reduced-motion instant fallback.
donts: Don't ship generic dark SaaS: no interchangeable one-blue-accent admin look. Blue is demoted to a single chart series.
Don't add enterprise bloat: no settings-soup, no modal-on-modal. The authorization model is flat, so the chrome stays light.
Don't drift playful or consumer: no candy-bright colors, no fully rounded pills, no soft mascot roundness.
Don't reproduce Datadog-style clutter: real charts and dense tables are welcome, the everything-at-once wall of panels is not.
Don't use a border-left or border-right thicker than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't set body text, buttons, or headings in tracked uppercase; reserve caps for the 11px label role.
Don't put a drop shadow on a resting card, tile, or row. Shadow is for floating overlays alone.
